# zenbitmaps public API — additions from non-default features
# features: all,bmp,hdr,imgref,qoi,rgb,simd,std,tga,zencodec
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

## summary
#
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        44
#   free functions                             40
#   inherent methods                           17
#   struct fields                               6
#   enum variants                               4
#   re-exports                                  4
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        89
#   auto-trait-complete types                  14
#   auto-trait exceptions                      24
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          115

pub trait DecodePixel: core::marker::Copy + 'static + pixel_traits::private::Sealed
pub fn DecodePixel::layout() -> PixelLayout
pub trait EncodePixel: core::marker::Copy + 'static + pixel_traits::private::Sealed
pub fn EncodePixel::layout() -> PixelLayout
pub fn decode_bmp(&[u8], impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'_>, BitmapError>
pub fn decode_bmp_img<P: DecodePixel>(&[u8], impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<imgref::ImgVec<P>, BitmapError> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn decode_bmp_img_with_limits<P: DecodePixel>(&[u8], &Limits, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<imgref::ImgVec<P>, BitmapError> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn decode_bmp_into<P: DecodePixel>(&[u8], imgref::ImgRefMut<'_, P>, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<(), BitmapError> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn decode_bmp_native(&[u8], impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'_>, BitmapError>
pub fn decode_bmp_native_with_limits<'a>(&'a [u8], &'a Limits, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'a>, BitmapError>
pub fn decode_bmp_permissive(&[u8], BmpPermissiveness, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'_>, BitmapError>
pub fn decode_bmp_permissive_with_limits<'a>(&'a [u8], BmpPermissiveness, &'a Limits, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'a>, BitmapError>
pub fn decode_bmp_pixels<P: DecodePixel>(&[u8], impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<(alloc::vec::Vec<P>, u32, u32), BitmapError> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn decode_bmp_pixels_with_limits<P: DecodePixel>(&[u8], &Limits, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<(alloc::vec::Vec<P>, u32, u32), BitmapError> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn decode_bmp_with_limits<'a>(&'a [u8], &'a Limits, impl enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<DecodeOutput<'a>, BitmapError>
